title: French Bistro Folding Table and Chair Set
features: The French Bistro Folding Table and Chair set is the perfect combination to turn your patio or backyard into a Parisian oasis.
If you're a cafe, bistro, pub or brewery owner, consider buying this set in bulk and providing a unique and warm seating option for your customers.
The chair can hold up to 364 pounds while the table can easily handle that pot roast with a robust weight rating of 165 pounds.

Additionally, The 28.5'' height and 21.25'' x 21.75'' tabletop surface creates ample space for 2 and when the season's over, both the French Bistro Folding Chairs and tables easily fold up and only weigh a combined 31 lbs. *Each set ships with a single table and 2 French Bistro Folding Chairs.
Some assembly required for the Bistro Folding Table*
